options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Seed goal condition.

Currently only supports:
- All Levels Complete

options.name: enable_level_complete
options.description: Enable Level Complete checks for each level.

options.name: enable_grain_all
options.description: Adds 'All Grain' checks (equivalent to 50/50 grains collected).

options.name: enable_grainsanity
options.description: Adds checks for collecting grain in steps

options.name: grainsanity_step
options.description:
How many grain per Grainsanity check.
Example: 10 means checks at 10, 20, 30, 40, 50 (up to max).
It's recommended to keep this as a factor of 50 (e.g. 5, 10, 25)

options.name: enable_flik_all
options.description: Adds 'FLIK Letters (All)' checks. Must collect F, L, I and K to receive this check.

options.name: enable_flik_individual
options.description: Adds individual FLIK checks for each FLIK letter.

options.name: enable_enemy_25
options.description: Adds checks for killing ~25% of enemies in a level.

options.name: enable_enemy_50
options.description: Adds checks for killing ~50% of enemies in a level.

options.name: enable_enemy_75
options.description: Adds checks for killing ~75% of enemies in a level.

options.name: enable_enemy_100
options.description: Adds checks for killing ~100% of enemies in a level.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
